title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Modular organization—each part of the
content:
✔ Modular organization—each part of the game can be referenced separately.
✔ Balances transparency & hidden mechanics—students see the world, but not the forces behind it.

📌 4. Finalization Plan – Execution Timeline & Order
1. Step 1: Finalize Macro-Level Course Structure (Weeks 1-15)
• 🚀 Deliverable: Fully structured syllabus with course themes, historical context, and interdisciplinary connections.
2. Step 2: Build Out the Weekly Module Templates
• 🚀 Deliverable: Week-by-week breakdown with integrated RPG elements.
3. Step 3: Create Public Player-Facing Documentation
• 🚀 Deliverable: Game rules, archetypes, XP tracking, items, and general mechanics.
4. Step 4: Build Instructor’s Hidden Mechanics Log
• 🚀 Deliverable: Full backend tracking system for XP, rolls, hidden influences, and secret events.
5. Step 5: Integrate Into Canvas & Set Up Tracking Sheets
• 🚀 Deliverable: Fully populated Canvas structure, game tracking Google Sheets, and narrative log.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 421 (chunk 421/555)
